title: 9 Herbal Teas For Heartburn
description: Cynara scolymus teas contains active constituents like flavonoids and saponins that help alleviate heartburn symptoms. The flavonoids, specifically apigenin and luteolin, have anti-inflammatory properties that reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining. Saponins, particularly cynarin, have a protective effect on the mucous membranes, preventing acid reflux and reducing the risk of damage to the esophagus.
